questionHtml:
Which molecules are produced during the hydrolysis of a triglyceride molecule?


A.  Water and glycerol

B.  Fatty acids and glycerol

C.  Water and fatty acids

D.  Water and lipids

meta.title: Which molecules are produced during the hydrolysis of a triglyceride molecule? A. Water and glycerol B. Fatty acids and glycerol C. Water and fatty acids D. Water and lipids
